rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Use explicit boolean expressions for range checks in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between AGREE declarations and AADL data types.
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions without proper scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible component ports or features.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their scope in AGREE
Implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
